zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Peter Dutton於1367年10月17日出生在英國爾達頓時，他的父親Edmund Dutton25歲，母親Joan Minshull25歲。他和Elizabeth Butler至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1433年10月17日在英國英格蘭爾沃林頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國爾諾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Peter Dutton于1367年10月17日出生在英国爾達頓时，他的父亲Edmund Dutton25岁，母亲Joan Minshull25岁。他和Elizabeth Butler至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1433年10月17日在英国英格兰爾沃林頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国爾諾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Peter Dutton was born on 17 October 1367, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, his father, Edmund Dutton, was 25 and his mother, Joan Minshull, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Butler. He died on 17 October 1433, in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Norton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Peter Dutton est né le 17 octobre 1367, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Dutton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Minshull, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Butler. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1433, à Warrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Norton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Peter Dutton am 17. Oktober 1367 in Dutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Dutton 25 und seine Mutter Joan Minshull 25. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Butler mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1433 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Peter Dutton è nato il il 17 ottobre 1367 nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Dutton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan Minshull, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Butler. Morì il 17 ottobre 1433, nel Warrington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Norton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Peter Duttonが1367年10月17日にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Edmund Duttonは25歳，母Joan Minshullは25歳であった。彼はElizabeth Butlerとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1433年10月17日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーリントンで66歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアノートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Peter Dutton(이)가 1367년 10월 17일 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Dutton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Minshull(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Butler(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1433년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워링턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 노르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.17 October 1367–17 October 1433: 17 de outubro de 1367–17 de outubro de 1433
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Peter Dutton nasceu em 17 de outubro de 1367, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Dutton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Minshull, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Elizabeth Butler. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1433, em Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Norton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Peter Dutton родился 17 октября 1367 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Dutton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Minshull, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Butler. Он умер 17 октября 1433 г. в местности варрингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности нортон, чешир, Англия.

es.17 October 1367–17 October 1433: 17 de octubre de 1367–17 de octubre de 1433
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Peter Dutton nació el 17 de octubre de 1367, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Dutton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Minshull, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Elizabeth Butler. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1433, en Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Norton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
